1.label: On the Floor
1.desc: The GDSense robot automatically patrols through warehouse aisles, acting as the moving eyes on site.

2.label: On the Edge
2.desc: Visual data is processed instantly on the local edge server to guarantee data privacy and zero delay.

3.label: On Your Screen
3.desc: Managers view real-time safety logs, misplacement alerts, and reports via a web dashboard.
